matches.title: The Impact of Digital Transformation on Firm Performance: Evidence from Technology-Driven Business Management Practices
matches.abstract: This study investigates the impact of digital transformation on firm performance using panel data from 5120 firm-year observations between 2014 and 2024. improvement_plan.title: Strengthen originality and contribution
improvement_plan.action: Convert descriptive material into synthesis: what is combined, what gap remains, and what the researcher contributes without overclaiming.
improvement_plan.evidence: Originality score is 61.8; contribution may not be sufficiently defended.

improvement_plan.title: Replace flagged phrases
improvement_plan.action: Review each flagged phrase and rewrite only where the replacement improves clarity or originality.
improvement_plan.evidence: Flagged phrase hits include: it is important to note that, furthermore.

improvement_plan.title: Strengthen citation signal
improvement_plan.action:
Add real citations to unsupported factual claims. Use the suggested citations below or find verified sources for each claim. Normalize citation style to APA 7 format without inventing sources.

Real citation suggestions from open research sources:
  • Perspective Chapter: MOOCs in India: Evolution, Innovation, Impact, and Roadmap (2025) — via arXiv
  • A Novel Approach to Analyze Fashion Digital Archive from Humanities (2021) — via arXiv
  • Building and development of an organizational competence for digital transformation in SMEs (2024) — via arXiv
  • Digital transformation to enhance Indonesian SME performance: Exploring the impact of market competition and digital strategy (2024) — via Crossref

Use these or similar verified citations. Only add citations for claims that genuinely reference these works.
improvement_plan.evidence: Citation quality is 10.3; citation coverage is 14.3% across claim-like sentences. 18 real citation suggestion(s) found from open research sources.
